376:   const loadPoojaProducts = async () => {
377:     setIsLoadingPooja(true);
378:     try {
379:       const { data, error } = await supabase
380:         .from('website_pooja_products')
381:         .select('*')
382:         .order('created_at', { ascending: false });
383:       if (error) throw error;
384:       if (data) {
385:         const mappedData: PoojaProduct[] = data.map((item: any) => ({
386:           id: item.id,
387:           name: item.name,
388:           description: item.description,
389:           price: item.price,
390:           originalPrice: item.original_price,
391:           rating: item.rating,
392:           reviewsCount: item.reviews_count,
393:           image: item.image,

396:           benefits: item.benefits || [],

399:           sanskritName: item.sanskrit_name,
400:           shortName: item.short_name,
401:           slug: item.slug,
402:           subtitle: item.subtitle,
403:           shortDescription: item.short_description,
404:           spiritualSignificance: item.spiritual_significance,
405:           material: item.material,
406:           weight: item.weight,

411:           samagriList: item.samagri_list,
